arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic’s Juventus career is OVER as Arsenal circle
arts.sum: Gazzetta dello Sport, Tuttosport and others all agree that Juventus will sell Vlahovic at the end of the season. Vlahovic’s contract in Turin expires in 2026 and Juve will do everything they can to sell the Serbian at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Inter Faces Injury Blow as Marcus Thuram Suffers Ankle Contusion Ahead of Juventus Clash
arts.sum: Inter Milan have been dealt a significant setback as star striker Marcus Thuram sustained an ankle injury during their Serie A match against Fiorentina at San Siro. The French forward was forced off in the 27th minute of the first half after suffering a painful contusion to his left ankle, leaving his availability for the upcoming Derby d’Italia against Juventus in doubt. The post Inter Faces Injury Blow as Marcus Thuram Suffers Ankle Contusion Ahead of Juventus Clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.
